name: No Call
body:
My name is Tyson and I will be your designer with Hansen Buildings! Thank you for reaching out to get started on a quote with me.

Here is the preliminary quote I put together to get us moving in the right direction. We are totally custom, so please feel free to come back with any adjustments you see fit.

What is included in that price?

• 2 sets of engineer-stamped plans (engineering costs included in the quote)
• A Lifetime Structural Guarantee on the building itself
• A fully-illustrated construction manual
• Access to our tech support line for any questions or clarification while in the field constructing
• All materials listed on the quote
• Delivery of materials to your jobsite

When are you hoping to get started on this project?

How do you plan to be using your new building?

name: After Call
body:
Thank you for taking the time to speak with me today! Attached is the preliminary quote I put together after our conversation.

We are totally custom, so please feel free to come back with any adjustments you see fit.

What is included in that price?

• 2 sets of engineer-stamped plans (engineering costs included in the quote)
• A Lifetime Structural Guarantee on the building itself
• A fully-illustrated construction manual
• Access to our tech support line for any questions or clarification while in the field constructing
• All materials listed on the quote
• Delivery of materials to your jobsite

How does everything look so far?

name: Example Request
body:
My name is Tyson and I will be your designer with Hansen Buildings! Thank you for reaching out to get started on a quote with me.

Do you happen to have any pictures or examples of what you are looking for that I can use to model your first quote after?
